subject: A large twin-bodied manta-ray-like Eldrazi creature hovering over collapsed or cowering armored humanoid figures on an arid plain
description: A striking Eldrazi creature with two distinct bulbous fish- or manta-ray-like bodies joined by a central membrane hovers prominently in the center of the image. Its coloration is iridescent — green, purple, and blue — with large eye-like features on each body. Below it, three or four humanoid figures in earth-toned armor are shown on their knees or collapsed, rendered small relative to the hovering creature above. The background is a dusty, hazy plain with eroded rock spires in the distance. The composition captures a moment of immobilization — the creature dominates, the humanoids are incapacitated.
foreground: armored humanoid figures collapsed or kneeling on arid ground
background: dusty plain, eroded rock formations, hazy sky
